mapper.select: select id, scenic_id, ticket_name, price, stock, available_date from ticket order by id asc
select id, scenic_id, ticket_name, price, stock, available_date from ticket where scenic_id = #{scenicId} order by available_date asc
mapper.insert: insert into ticket (scenic_id, ticket_name, price, stock, available_date) values (#{scenicId}, #{ticketName}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{availableDate})
mapper.update: update ticket set scenic_id = #{scenicId}, ticket_name = #{ticketName}, price = #{price}, stock = #{stock}, available_date = #{availableDate} where id = #{id}
